title: Nika Turns the Battle
description: On pages 2–4, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Vegapunk, Unknown person #2, Kizaru, Unknown person #3, Luffy as Luffy’s Gear Fifth form re-enters the battle while the giants arrive, Vegapunk’s broadcast begins, and the Five Elders become the island’s central threat.
scene: Luffy’s Gear Fifth form re-enters the battle while the giants arrive, Vegapunk’s broadcast begins, and the Five Elders become the island’s central threat.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Vegapunk, is this wise???

dialogue.speaker: Vegapunk
dialogue.text: A message to the world!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ZAZA-

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even if you set this broadcast to start suddenly, it may not work...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hmz what do you mean, Shaka!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're counting too much on people being ready to receive and relay this.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Pl-and-c-c-d-be-be-be-be-be-be-be-be-be-be-be-be-be-be-be-be-be-be-be-be-be-be-be-be-be-be-be

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You know how it is with information!! Agencies always spread the news all around the world by the next day!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As soon as they receive it, word will spread all across the world by the next day!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You think so? But what if someone interprets or censors our message?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What the? Where is this broadcast coming from?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's coming from every ship's transgender snail!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You're right... any suggestions?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We could piggyback off of the navy's comms traffic...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Cut the connec- tion!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: That's the thing, we can't!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That would allow us to force a worldwide constant broadcast with our signal strength at maximum!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I see, that'll make it possible for anyone with a transgender snail to receive our initial voice message...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But they'll still need a while to prepare their visual transgender snails.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The time to set that up will vary from place to place.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Let's take an interval of one hour.

dialogue.speaker: Kizaru
dialogue.text: What are you planning to say, vegapunk?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: That's vegapunk, right?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: An hour?! That's too long! Don't you realize what will happen in that time???

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Where is it coming from? Why now?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There are people who won't be pleased when we start this broadcast. They may find a way to terminate it before we finish!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ah, fair point! In that case... let's set the preparation interval to...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: UWAA!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: 10 minutes!!

dialogue.speaker: Kizaru
dialogue.text: Vegapunk!! That's your voice, right?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Hey!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: People of the world!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: The Holy Land of Mary Geoise

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: What is this trans- mission?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Saturn...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: What is the meaning of this?!

dialogue.speaker: Kizaru
dialogue.text: Have you dealt with vegapunk?

summary: This part advances the Nika Returns on Egghead through 37 cleaned dialogue beats, centering the emotional stakes, battle movement, and the wider consequences of Egghead.
